creator: kuriyama@FreeBSD.org
text:
Reworked pgpool-II was released (http://pgpool.projects.postgresql.org/pgpool-II/en/).

While current pgpool-3.1.1 (aka pgpool-I) was developed by mainly Ishii-san, pgpool-II (current version is 1.0.2) was rewritten and improved by SRA OSS, Inc.

Both of them will be continued, so I'd like to repocopy it.
